This pattern suggests sympathetic overdrive that typically precedes POTS symptom worsening, requiring immediate intervention to prevent further autonomic dysfunction.

Days with HRV above 65ms (May 1-2, April 28) show better readiness for full vestibular rehabilitation protocols.
analysis.focus_for_next_week: Priority focus on autonomic stabilization: increase LMNT electrolyte intake, ensure complete rest on low-HRV days (<50ms), and investigate what triggered the May 1-4 decline to prevent further POTS destabilization.
